post.description: Verify a user's email address using the OTP sent during registration.
Resend the OTP verification email. Subject to rate-limiting.

Request a password-reset code.

Always returns 200 with a generic message regardless of whether the
email exists.  This prevents user-enumeration attacks.
Verify the reset code and set a new password.

Logout the current user by invalidating their token.

The token is added to a blocklist and will be rejected on subsequent requests.

schema.title: Response Logout Api Auth Logout Post

get.description: Initiate Google OAuth login flow.
Initiate GitHub OAuth login flow.
Request an updated GitHub OAuth authorization with repo-level scopes.
Handle browser redirect callback for Google OAuth.
Handle browser redirect callback for GitHub OAuth.
Get current user's profile.

delete.description:
Delete current user's account (soft delete).

Requires password verification for security.
The account will be deactivated, not permanently deleted.
Contact support to reactivate or permanently delete your data.

patch.description:
Update current user's profile.

Allows updating:
- full_name
- github_username
- career_interest
- skills

post.description:
Retry generating embedding for the current user.
Queues a background task to regenerate the user's embedding.

put.description:
Change current user's password.

Requires current password for verification.
New password must be at least 8 characters.

get.description:
Sync the current user's GitHub profile into VentureScope.

If the user is not connected via GitHub OAuth yet, the response includes
an authorization URL that starts the GitHub OAuth flow.
If the connected token is missing repo-level access, the response includes
an updated authorization URL to request broader scopes.
Get persisted GitHub sync snapshot data for the current user.

put.description:
Update current user's skills.

Skills should be a list of strings representing the user's professional skills.
This will update the user's embedding for better recommendations.

post.description:
Upload a CV for the current user.

Allowed file types: PDF, DOC, DOCX
Maximum file size: 10MB

The CV will be stored in S3 and the URL will be saved in the database.
The user's embedding will be updated to include CV information.

delete.description:
Delete the current user's CV.

This will remove the CV from S3 and clear the CV URL from the database.
The user's embedding will be updated.

get.description:
Get a presigned URL for downloading the user's CV.

The presigned URL will be valid for the specified expiration time (default: 1 hour).

post.description:
Upload a profile picture for the current user.

Allowed file types: JPG, PNG, WEBP
Maximum file size: 5MB

The profile picture will be stored in S3 and the URL will be saved in the database.

delete.description:
Delete the current user's profile picture.

This will remove the profile picture from S3 and clear the URL from the database.

get.description: Get the profile picture URL for the current user.
List all work experiences.

schema.title: Response List Experiences Api Users Me Experiences Get

post.description: Add a new work experience entry.

get.description:
List all users with pagination (admin only).

- **page**: Page number (default: 1)
- **per_page**: Items per page, max 100 (default: 10)
- **include_inactive**: Include deactivated users (default: False)
Get a specific user by ID (admin only).

patch.description:
Update any user (admin only).

Can update:
- full_name
- github_username
- career_interest
- role
- is_active
- is_admin

delete.description:
Delete a user (admin only).

By default uses soft delete (deactivates the account).
Set hard_delete=true to permanently remove the user.

Cannot delete yourself.

get.description:
Get current user's transcript configuration.

Auto-creates default configuration (US 4.0 Scale) if none exists.

put.description:
Update current user's transcript configuration.

Creates new configuration if none exists.
Validates that:
- GPA scale is positive and <= 100
- Grading schema is not empty
- Grade display order matches schema keys

delete.description:
Reset configuration to default (US 4.0 Scale).

Deletes current configuration and recreates with default values.

get.description:
Get available grading system presets.

Returns a list of predefined grading configurations including:
- US 4.0 Scale (Standard)
- US 5.0 Scale (Weighted)
- European 10-Point Scale
- UK Classification System
- Percentage-Based (100-Point)

These can be used directly to configure the user's grading system.

Get all transcript versions for the current user.

Returns all versions (up to 3) ordered by version number descending (newest first).
Each version represents a separate upload with its own timestamp.

post.description:
Upload a new academic transcript.

Creates a new version of the transcript and performs the following:
- Validates all GPA values against your configured grading scale
- Ensures student_id consistency across uploads
- Automatically deletes old versions (keeps latest 3)
- Returns upload metadata including version number

Rate limit: 10 uploads per hour per user.

**Validation:**
- At least one semester is required
- SGPA and CGPA must not exceed your configured GPA scale
- Student ID must match existing transcripts (if any exist)
- Credit hours must be positive
- Grade points must be non-negative (or null)

delete.description:
Delete all transcript versions for the current user.

**Warning:** This operation cannot be undone.
All transcript data will be permanently deleted.

get.description:
Get the latest transcript version for the current user.

Returns the most recently uploaded transcript.
Useful for Chrome extension to fetch current data without listing all versions.

post.description:
Get recommended grading configuration based on transcript data.

Analyzes the grades in your transcript and suggests the most appropriate
grading system preset (e.g., US 4.0 Scale, European 10-Point, etc.).

**Note:** This is a read-only operation and doesn't upload the transcript.
Use this before uploading to ensure you have the correct grading configuration.

Returns:
- Detected grades from your transcript
- Recommended preset name
- Confidence level (high/medium/low)
- Explanation for the recommendation
- Complete suggested configuration

get.description:
Get a specific transcript by ID.

You can only access your own transcripts.

delete.description:
Delete a specific transcript version.

**Note:** Transcripts are immutable after upload.
To update data, upload a new version instead of modifying existing ones.

post.description: Create a new chat session for the authenticated user.

get.description: List the current user's chat sessions, newest first.

schema.title: Response List Sessions Api Chat Sessions Get

get.description: Get a specific session including its full message history.

delete.description: Delete a chat session and all its messages.

get.description:
List all notifications for the current user.
Use `unread_only=true` to filter to unread ones.

post.description: Mark all unread notifications as read.

patch.description: Mark a single notification as read.
